description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test that runs on every pull request and push to the main branch. Use a matrix job on ubuntu-latest to test with multiple Python versions and Pydantic v2 configurations. The job checks out the code, sets up Python, and installs Poetry. It then sets up PostgreSQL, MongoDB, and Scylla, and runs unit tests with coverage for various configurations, including Pydantic v2, SQLAlchemy 2.0, Odmantic, and gino. Finally, it uploads the coverage report to Codecov.
